name: Logo
description: The Cartrack wordmark + arrow mark, and the rules governing how it is reproduced across marketing surfaces. Two lockup orientations exist: a horizontal lockup (arrow mark beside "CARTRACK") and a stacked lockup (arrow mark above the wordmark).
keyRule: Never redraw, recolour outside approved applications, distort, or rotate the mark. Always give it the minimum clearspace shown in the guideline before any other element.

pages.name: Main logo versions
pages.description: Defines the two approved lockups: horizontal and stacked. Establishes which is the default (horizontal) and when the stacked version is used (tighter/squarer spaces).

pages.name: Clearspace
pages.description: Minimum padding around the logo, defined relative to the height of the arrow mark (exact ratio: TBD — verify against Figma). No text, imagery, or other logos may intrude into this zone.

pages.name: Partner lockups
pages.description: Co-branding rules for joint marks with partners (examples shown: AVIS, Coca-Cola). A vertical divider rule separates the Cartrack mark from the partner mark, with defined spacing on both sides — the partner mark is sized to optical (not literal) parity with the Cartrack mark, not simply matched height.

pages.name: Size and positioning
pages.description: Minimum reproduction size and placement conventions (exact minimum size: TBD — verify against Figma).

pages.name: Colour applications
pages.description: Approved logo colour treatments on white, black/dark, and photographic backgrounds. Includes a full-colour version, a white knockout, and a black version.

pages.name: Incorrect logo usage
pages.description: Explicit "don't" examples — distortion, recolouring, low contrast placement, and effects (shadows/outlines) are shown struck through or marked incorrect.

pages.name: Logomark usage
pages.description: Rules for when the arrow mark can be used alone without the wordmark (e.g. favicon, app icon, small-format social avatars, watermarking) and when the full lockup is required instead.

doThis: Use the horizontal lockup by default; switch to stacked only in square/tight formats.
Maintain full clearspace before any other element.
Use the partner-lockup divider convention for any co-branded material.
Use the logomark alone only in the contexts the guideline calls out (small formats, watermarks).
dontDoThis: Don't redraw, distort, rotate, or recolour the mark outside approved applications.
Don't place the full-colour logo on low-contrast backgrounds.
Don't add effects — shadows, outlines, glows.
Don't scale partner logos to literal height parity — match optically.
relationToProductTokens: No direct product-token equivalent — the logo is a brand asset, not a design token. Product UI should treat the app bar / nav logo placement as a separate, product-specific decision documented in the relevant component doc (e.g. AppBar), not derived from this file.
openQuestions: Exact clearspace ratio and minimum reproduction size are visible in the guideline but not confirmed at pixel level — pull exact values if this logo usage needs to be enforced programmatically (e.g. lint rule for a marketing site builder).
